creator: monkeyman_stones@comcast.net
text:
1080 Progressive scan video of instal attempt from start to freeze-up of BSD can be seen on YouTube here: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jn2WAc8b_GE .
Installation freezes at:
"run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 60 seconds for xpt_config
run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 120 seconds for xpt_config
run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 180 seconds for xpt_config
run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 240 seconds for xpt_config
run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 300 seconds for xpt_config"

Left to run for 3 hours with no change. Remained at line "run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 300 seconds for xpt_config"

Fix: 

Unknown. I am told the problem may be the Firewire port not being accepted by BSD or the fingerprint scanner not being accepted by BSD but I could not say as no information can be pulled as the result of the freeze up at "run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 300 seconds for xpt_config". No command line available at that point on.
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to install again to repeat problem. Same outcome with every install attampt of PC-BSD 8.2 64-bit and PC-BSD 9.0 Beta2 64-bit.
